name: ca3
description: Connect Codex to CA3, a private memory layer for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Use CA3 as Codex's private memory layer.
interface.longDescription: CA3 gives AI agents a private, user-owned memory layer so important context can follow you across ChatGPT, Codex, Claude Code, and browser workflows. This plugin connects Codex to CA3 through OAuth MCP so Codex can use the current scoped notes and attachments surface.
defaultPrompt: Use CA3 to remember this project context.
Search CA3 for related notes before changing code.
Save this durable project decision in CA3 with the reason it matters later.
